headline: I make paintings and drawings that sit in the space between observation and imagination.

children.text: Based between London and the countryside, my work is rooted in close attention to light, material, and place. I am drawn to the overlooked — a doorway, a field after rain, the geometry of afternoon shadows — and to finding in these things something that resists easy explanation.
I studied at the Slade School of Fine Art and have shown work in group and solo exhibitions across the UK and Europe. I also take on a small number of commissions each year.
If you are interested in a work, a commission, or simply want to talk about painting, I would love to hear from you.

education.description: Slade School of Fine Art, MFA

collections.name: Private collections, UK, Germany, and USA
